message:
perf(db): replace O(n²) Vec::contains dedup with HashSet in message recipient handling

In reply_message's recipient deduplication, two sequential loops used
Vec::contains() for dedup — O(n) per insertion, O(n²) total. With 100+
recipients (CC/BCC lists, thread participants), this performs ~10,000
unnecessary comparisons.

Replaced with HashSet<i64> for O(1) lookups. The Vec is still built for
ordered iteration, but dedup decisions use the HashSet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
